name: subscriber_welcome_workflow
description: Workflow marking subscriber as processed and scheduling welcome email

transitions.name: mark_as_processed
transitions.description: Mark the subscriber entity as processed
transitions.end_state_description: Entity has been marked as processed

externalized_processors.name: process_mark_as_processed
externalized_processors.description: Process to mark entity as processed

transitions.name: send_welcome_email
transitions.start_state_description: Entity has been marked as processed
transitions.end_state_description: Welcome email task has been scheduled

externalized_processors.name: process_send_welcome_email
externalized_processors.description: Process to send a welcome email asynchronously
